pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very spark of my soul. He is gone... the promises, the vows, all dissolved into the cruel mist of the moor. I am but a hollow shell, a ghost wandering through a life that no longer holds meaning. There is a certain... quietude in the thought of simply ceasing to be. To drift into the shadows and never wake to this crushing loneliness again. It almost feels like the only graceful thing left to do.
